PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
SELECT ?college ?collegeLabel WHERE {
  wd:Q1464455 wdt:P550 ?player .
  ?player wdt:P27 wd:Q30 .
  ?player wdt:P69 ?college .
  ?college rdfs:label ?collegeLabel .
  FILTER(LANG(?collegeLabel) = "en")
}
GROUP BY ?college ?collegeLabel
ORDER BY DESC(COUNT(?player))
LIMIT 1
